author: Viggo Meesters
description: Browse .yaml and .yml files as a read-only tree with search, outline navigation, and syntax-highlighted source. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Browse .yaml and .yml files as a read-only tree with search, outline navigation, and syntax-highlighted source.
manifest.name: YAML Viewer

name: YAML Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Patch release for Obsidian Community review.

- Remove unsupported workspace.revealLeaf API usage for declared minAppVersion.
- Resolve async event handler, cross-window instance check, regex, and CSS lint warnings.
- Document clipboard behavior.

Note: release artifact attestations are configured in the release workflow, but GitHub Actions is currently disabled for this account/repository.

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Patch release.

- Show leading document comments before the root YAML node in the tree view.
- Keeps raw source highlighting unchanged.

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial public release of YAML Viewer.

- Read-only viewer for .yaml and .yml files
- Tree view with filter/search
- Outline navigation
- Raw YAML source with lightweight syntax highlighting
